raw_responses.title: Nature of back slopping kombucha fermentation: microbial succession, metabolites composition changes
raw_responses.snippet: Days 0-4: yeasts (Brettanomyces, Saccharomyces, Pichia) dominate; AAB grow later, converting sugars to acetic acid; pH drops.

raw_responses.title: SCOBY (Wikipedia)
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain: symbiotic culture of bacteria + yeast forms cellulose pellicle interphase; provides oxygen+nutrient access for embedded microbes.

raw_responses.title: Multi-Agent LLM Systems: From Emergent Collaboration to Structured Collective Intelligence
raw_responses.snippet: Global properties of multi-agent systems (belief robustness, hypothesis diversity, long-horizon ability) emerge from communication topology + memory substrate; role specialization + shared memory.

raw_responses.title: Drop the Hierarchy and Roles: How Self-Organizing LLM Agents Outperform Designed Structures
raw_responses.snippet: Endogeneity paradox: optimal coordination from minimal scaffolding + full role autonomy; agents spontaneously form structures and invent specialized roles.

raw_responses.title: Emergent Coordination in Multi-Agent Language Models (Riedl)
raw_responses.snippet: Emergent coordination across multi-agent LM populations.

raw_responses.title: Multi-Agent Collaboration Mechanisms: A Survey of LLMs
raw_responses.snippet: Natural language as universal coordination medium; emergent behaviors; AgentVerse agents specialize in distinct cooperative roles.

raw_responses.title: AgentNet: Decentralized Evolutionary Coordination
raw_responses.snippet: Agents specialize dynamically, adjust connectivity, route tasks without predefined workflows.

raw_responses.title: LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems for SE: Literature Review (ACM TOSEM)
raw_responses.snippet: Reviews multi-agent LLM systems for software engineering; surveys role-specialization patterns.
